2606.31859.title: Review Residuals: Update-Conditioned Residual Gating for Transformers
2606.31859.paper_summary: Residual connections add every sublayer's proposed update with a fixed coefficient of one; the network never evaluates whether an update is reliable before committing it. Drawing on the human-factors principle of independent verification, we introduce Review Residuals, which scale each update by a learned, input-dependent gate conditioned on both the current state and the proposed update: h_l = h_{l-1} + r_l * u_l with r_l = sigmoid(W[RMSNorm(h_{l-1}), RMSNorm(u_l)]). Conditioning the gate on the update is the property that distinguishes it from prior gated and scaled residuals. We report two findings. First, a depth-stability result: a convex (Highway-style) form of the gate reintroduces vanishing gradients and fails to train beyond ~20 layers, whereas the additive, identity-preserving form trains stably at all depths we tested. Second, an emergence-with-scale result: trained from scratch across five sizes (60M-1B parameters, multi-seed), Review Residuals show no advantage at small scale but at 590M significantly outperform both a parameter-matched Highway gate and a parameter-matched standard residual (p<0.05), with a larger advantage at 1B. The benefit grows with model size rather than shrinking.
2606.31859.paper_summary_zh: 殘差連接將每個子層提議的更新與固定的係數一相加；網絡在提交更新之前從不評估其可靠性。基於人因學的獨立驗證原則，我們引入了審查殘差，該殘差通過一個學習的、依賴於輸入的閘來縮放每個更新，該閘以當前狀態和提議的更新為條件：h_l = h_{l-1} + r_l * u_l，其中 r_l = sigmoid(W[RMSNorm(h_{l-1}), RMSNorm(u_l)])。將閘的條件設置在更新上是使其與先前的閘和縮放殘差區分開來的特性。我們報告了兩個發現。首先，一個深度穩定性結果：閘的凸（高速公路風格）形式重新引入了消失的梯度，並且在超過約20層時無法訓練，而加法的、保持身份的形式在我們測試的所有深度上都能穩定訓練。其次，一個隨規模出現的結果：從零開始訓練五種大小（60M-1B參數，多種種子），審查殘差在小規模下沒有優勢，但在590M時顯著超越了參數匹配的高速公路閘和參數匹配的標準殘差（p<0.05），在1B時具有更大的優勢。隨著模型大小的增長，這一好處也隨之增長，而不是縮小。
2606.31859.author: Kyle Kramer et.al.
